entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚说明', this section provides detailed information about the hardware pins of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, located at page 14.
This section is part of the hardware manual for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board and provides an overview of the pin configurations and functions.

relations.description: The section '引脚说明' is the parent section of '2引脚说明. .14 ', which provides detailed information about the hardware pins.
